{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Arelius family portal
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] once came through the [[Arelius family portal]] as a beaten and burned [[Underlord]] nine years ago.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
